title.rendered: [Free Mini Webinar] How to Craft the Perfect “Pitch” for Your Nonprofit

content.rendered:
Pitching is not about “asking” or “soliciting” as much as it is about having a powerful, compelling, and consistent way of explaining your nonprofit’s cause. ​In this free 20-minute webinar, you will learn t​he fundamentals of pitching your nonprofit which will leave you feeling empowered to confidently ask for financial support. The presentation will help you:

  • Identify the key elements of a repeatable and compelling “pitch” or “case for support”
  • Find 1-3 powerful stories, results, or goals that light a fire in others
  • Understand what to do instead of listing stats and programs

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 24 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
